evidence: all four water continuations produced at least 20 retained representative steps
each water lane continued advancing to a later retained endpoint before freeze
no water lane failed with OOM or node failure before the manual freeze
slurm accounting for the four foamRun steps reported MaxRSS between about 0.65 and 0.73 GB and MaxVMSize between about 5.26 and 5.34 GB
water_pack_assessment.scientific_boundary: operationally acceptable does not mean converged; Water 4 remained the least settled lane at freeze.
